kit.scope: Prepare a later human office pilot without storing real customer data or claiming measured savings.

phases.label: Baseline before KosmoOrbit
phases.guard: Use only anonymized or demo project context.

phases.label: KosmoOrbit evidence capture
phases.guard: Read local panels only; do not write customer data.

phases.label: Role surface round
phases.guard: No real accounts or permissions are created.

phases.label: Human pilot decision
phases.output: continue, pause, blocked or needs more evidence
phases.guard: Decision remains local until owner approves sharing.

measurement_cards.label: Time to understand project state
measurement_cards.baseline_prompt: How long does orientation take in the normal workflow?
measurement_cards.kosmoorbit_prompt: How long until the project package, gates and next action are understood in KosmoOrbit?

measurement_cards.label: Important blockers visible before design work
measurement_cards.baseline_prompt: Which blockers are normally found late?
measurement_cards.kosmoorbit_prompt: Which blockers are visible before KosmoDesign work starts?

measurement_cards.label: Role surface fit
measurement_cards.baseline_prompt: How well does the normal tool surface fit this person?
measurement_cards.kosmoorbit_prompt: How well does the KosmoOrbit role surface fit this person?

measurement_cards.label: KosmoDesign handoff clarity
measurement_cards.baseline_prompt: How clear is the current route from context to design work?
measurement_cards.kosmoorbit_prompt: How clear is the review-only KosmoDesign handoff?

measurement_cards.label: Can the same review be repeated tomorrow?
measurement_cards.baseline_prompt: How repeatable is the normal review path?
measurement_cards.kosmoorbit_prompt: How repeatable is the KosmoOrbit review path with evidence links?

scoring.note: No score is calculated until a human pilot fills the cards.
